description: You are an NLP research scientist preparing a pre-training corpus using 19th-century public domain texts. The custom text normalization and tokenization pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/historical_nlp/ is failing its test suite due to five specific bugs: stripping diacritics, garbling HTML entities, breaking on line-wrap hyphens, splitting sentences on abbreviations, and mis-sorting BPE merges. Fix these bugs in the pipeline modules so that the pytest suite passes without modifying the test files.
